MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ARUP NORTH AMERICA LTD's MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

ARUP North America Ltd.'s unopposed good faith settlement motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
